security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https: asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self' blob:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; worker-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-src 'none'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https: asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' blob:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://localhost:1420 http://localhost:1420; worker-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-src 'none'

cli.description: Mutka — community-driven file explorer for macOS

args.name: picker
args.description: Open the file picker and output the selected path to stdout

args.name: run
args.description: Run a module action by ID (e.g. core.clipboard.copy)

args.name: list-actions
args.description: List all registered module actions and exit

bundle.shortDescription: Community-driven modular file explorer for macOS
bundle.longDescription: Mutka is a fast, macOS file explorer built on a community-first modular architecture. Every feature — copy/paste, navigation, file operations — is a swappable module. Built with Tauri 2 and React 18.
